programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: When Indiana native Everett Case arrives in Raleigh to become the coach at North Carolina State, his vision spearheads not just the rise of college basketball at his school and in the region, but the start of a conference that will change the sport.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: From Frank McGuire to Bones McKinney and Vic Bubas, new coaches emerge to challenge the early success of Everett Case. It all precedes a final poignant moment of triumph for Case at the only home the ACC Tournament has, until this point, ever known.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: After a rough start, North Carolina's Dean Smith comes to be known for both dominance and dignity, playing a central role in desegregating the ACC with the recruitment of Charlie Scott, who emerges as a star on some of Smith's greatest teams.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: Dean Smith's North Carolina teams may be the class of the ACC, but rivals also flourish, including a Virginia team led by Wally Walker, and a Duke program that re-emerges with a championship run in 1978 and a controversial title two years later.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: Virginia's Ralph Sampson earns national player of the year honors three times, but never wins the ACC Tournament. Dean Smith seeks a title with freshman Michael Jordan, and the charismatic Jim Valvano leads NC State on a memorable Cinderella run.

programme.title: Gunslingers

programme.title: Gunslingers

programme.title: Gunslingers

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War
programme.desc: September 1862. Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.desc: The crew of the Allied Lancaster ME669 bomber had one of the most dangerous jobs of World War II, but the controversial tactic known as "total war" overshadowed its legacy.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La luz de mi vida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposo Hakan, Elif descubre que él llevaba una doble vida y tenía una hija con una mujer llamada Firat.

programme.title: Bajo el mismo cielo
programme.desc: La historia de Carlos Martínez, un padre mexicano indocumentado que vive en Los Ángeles, un hombre trabajador y honrado que lucha para darle una mejor vida a sus dos hijos Luis y Rodrigo, pero su mayor temor es ser deportado y perder a su familia.

programme.title: Live: MLB Central
programme.desc: MLB Network's first-ever regular-season morning show features hosts Robert Flores, Mark DeRosa and Lauren Shehadi reporting from Studio 21, named in honor of Hall of Famer and humanitarian Roberto Clemente. programme.title: Live: MLB Now
programme.desc: The hourlong weekday afternoon "MLB Now" presents the day's top stories in baseball by spanning the sport's cultural divide. Host Brian Kenny discusses the issues and provides analysis, with a bent toward modern analytics to prove his points. The series also features interviews with personalities throughout the game, and viewer opinions are welcome as well via social media polls.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The queens must impersonate their favorite celebrities.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The queens hit the streets of Hollywood to prank unsuspecting passers-by.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: All star girl groups; the battle of the divas.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The final four assume super hero and super foe alter egos.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens discover an explosive surprise -- that they must immediately perform six lip syncs to defend their place in the competition.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens form a pop group to write lyrics and perform choreography to a new version of RuPaul's song "Condragulations"; choreographer Jamal Sims guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: As the race for the crown continues, queens must write lyrics and perform choreography in a performance of RuPaul's song, "Phenomenon"; comedian and host Nicole Byer guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to overact in RuPaulmark holiday movies; comedian Loni Love ("Soul Plane") guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise as the queens put their design skills to the test in a pageant showcasing three bag-themed looks; Nicole Byer guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens funk it up in a disco-dancing documentary, complete with 1970s fashions.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens flex their improv skills in a reboot of the salacious talk show "Bossy Rossy," hosted by Ross Mathews; LGBT activist Ts Madison guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens must record lyrics and learn choreography as they perform in a tale on social media; choreographer Jamal Sims guest judges; Anne Hathaway makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens must record lyrics and learn choreography as they perform in a tale on social media; choreographer Jamal Sims guest judges; Anne Hathaway makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in the Snatch Game; LGBT activist Ts Madison guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: It's Freaky Friday and the queens must turn each other into their own drag doppelgangers; Loni Love ("Soul Plane") guest judges; psychic Char Margolis makes an appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must create and brand their own versions of extravagant soft drinks; current reigning superstar Jaida Essence Hall makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens take part in a comedy roast of former "Miss Congeniality" winners Heidi N Closet, Nina West and Valentina; a guest appearance by Norvina (Instant Influencer).

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens flex their acting skills in a new sci-fi adventure, playing tiny shrunken drag queens; Cynthia Erivo ("Genius: Aretha"); Scarlett Johansson ("Black Widow") makes a virtual appearance in the workroom.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens write and record lyrics; the world premiere of RuPaul's new song "Lucky"; choreographer Jamal Sims makes a guest appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The Season 13 queens are back to dish on various moments from the season; featuring personal interviews, original music videos and a special lip sync.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: It's time to crown the winner; the top four queens compete in a finale lip-sync smackdown; the queens pick a Miss Congeniality.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Lady Gaga meets the new queens competing for the title of "America's Next Drag Superstar"; the Miss Charisma Uniqueness Nerve and Talent pageant.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Lisa Kudrow visits; the queens must perform in an epic cheer battle; the B-52s guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must create fairy-tale drag princesses and become sassy sidekicks; guest judges Todrick Hall and Cheyenne Jackson.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens join the morning talk show wars; guest judges Naya Rivera and Jeffrey Bowyer-Chapman.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Todrick Hall directs the queens in a reality stars musical; guest judge Meghan Trainor.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in a TV game show; guest judges Candis Cayne and Denis O'Hare.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens act in a '90s high school drama, directed by Tori Spelling and Jennie Garth.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens perform a comedy roast of RuPaul in front of a live audience; guest judges Tamar Braxton and Fortune Feimster.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens create, write and star in their own television pilots; guest judges Noah Galvin and Lisa Robertson.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens make over members of the "Drag Race" crew; singer Kesha and gown designer Zaldy guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in a queer culture pageant and design outfits inspired by the Village People; actress Andie MacDowell and supermodel Joan Smalls guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in a queer culture pageant and design outfits inspired by the Village People; actress Andie MacDowell and supermodel Joan Smalls guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must write and perform a rap on RuPaul's new single and guest star on RuPaul's podcast with Michelle Visage.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens reunite to dish about the most shocking, glamorous and sickening moments of the season.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: RuPaul crowns America's Next Drag Superstar.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Miley Cyrus goes undercover in the workroom to spy on the new cast of queens competing for $100,000; the first test is to create signature looks from materials belonging to former Drag Race legends.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to act in drag queen versions of blockbuster movies; actors Sydelle Noel ("Black Panther") and Bobby Moynihan ("Saturday Night Live") guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens put their pop icon knowledge to the test when they have to perform in diva worship talk shows; actor Troye Sivan ("Boy Erased") and actor Guillermo Diaz ("Scandal") guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens get political in a musical set in the "Trump School For Girls;" TV show host Rachel Maddow makes a guest appearance, while Tiffany "New York" Pollard and Joel McHale guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in a spooky pageant of monster inspired couture and showcase three Halloween inspired looks; supermodel Cara Delevingne and pop culture icon Elvira guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens get physical in the 69th International Draglympics; choreographer Travis Wall and Olympian figure skaters Mirai Nagasu and Adam Rippon guest judge; camp aerobicise queen Love Connie makes a guest appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens use organic ingredients to create sickening but sustainable high fashion looks; supermodel Amber Valletta and reality star Kandi Burruss guest judge; drag queen Alyssa Edwards makes a guest appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in a nautical-themed version of the legendary Snatch Game; actors Tony Hale and Clea DuVall ("Veep") guest judge; drag queen Jinkx Monsoon makes a guest appearance.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens clash with the law in the hit TV series "Los Angeles Drag Patrol"; Natasha Lyonne, Cheyenne Jackson and Fortune Feimster guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must razzle and dazzle in their very own magic show; actresses Gina Rodriguez ("Jane the Virgin") and Katherine Langford ("13 Reasons Why") guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens make over returning queens, transforming them into members of their own drag family; Lena Waithe ("The Chi") and comic Wanda Sykes guest judge.

programme.desc: Squidward bets that SpongeBob can not go one day without crying; Mrs. Puff must work at the Krusty Krab over her summer break.

programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities; when Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.desc: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

programme.title: Murder in Glitterball City
programme.desc: After Joey Banis is found guilty of the murder of James Carroll, the trial of Jeffrey Mundt begins. Joey Banis's video "confession" is scrutinized and allegedly staged by Mundt. The second trial concludes with a stunning outcome.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie

programme.title: The Jinx: The Life and Deaths of Robert Durst

programme.desc: The Capitals prove hockey is for everyone! From spotlighting local deaf teen hockey player and Emmy award winning actor, Keivonn Woodard, to Capitals players hitting the ice to mentor players of color, and a ceremonial puck drop honoring Black History Month, this episode celebrates a more inclusive future for the game of hockey!

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
